caption: The video showcases a detailed look at a collectible baseball card featuring Tim Raines, an outfielder for the Montreal Expos. The card is part of the 2021 Topps Transcendent Collection - Hall of Fame Edition and is presented as a One-of-One 1989 Topps Big Baseball Framed Autograph Card. The card includes various statistics such as Raines' height, weight, batting and throwing preferences, birth date, and hometown. It also highlights his major league batting record with details like games played, at-bats, runs, hits, doubles, triples, home runs, RBIs, batting average, and on-base percentage. Additionally, the card provides fielding statistics including putouts, assists, and fielding average. The video appears to be part of a live stream or recording by Jaspys Casebreaks, as indicated by the logo and branding in the corner, suggesting that this is a moment of unveiling a rare and valuable collectible item.
